etymology.description: phonetic 爿 + semantic ⺼ + semantic 寸 -> offering meat as tribute
etymology.interpretation: The character 將(將) (jiāng, "lead") combines the phonetic component 爿(爿) ("bed; small table") with semantic elements ⺼(⺼) ("meat") and 寸(寸) ("hand"). This configuration suggests the concept of offering meat on a table, with a hand indicating the action of presenting or leading in a ritual context. Over time, this notion of directing or leading became associated with the act of guiding or commanding.
etymology.simplification: 将(將): The simplified form removes the components ⺼ ("meat") and 寸 ("hand"), merging into a single simplified character while maintaining the phonetic similarity through the shape resemblance.

examples.chinese: 他将成为一个伟大的领袖(他將成為一個偉大的領袖)。
examples.pinyin: Tā jiāng chéngwéi yīgè wěidà de lǐngxiù.
examples.english: He will become a great leader.

examples.chinese: 这次胜利将再次激励我们(這次勝利將再次激勵我們)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè cì shènglì jiāng zàicì jīlì wǒmen.
examples.english: This victory will inspire us again.

examples.chinese: 我们将来可能会遇到挑战(我們將來可能會遇到挑戰)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen jiānglái kěnéng huì yùdào tiǎozhàn.
examples.english: We may encounter challenges in the future.
